metadata.description: Display OpenAI Codex API usage and costs inside Claude Code

plugins.name: codex-hud
plugins.description: Real-time Codex rate limit monitoring in Claude Code statusline. Parses local session logs for Usage/Weekly bars with reset timers. 10 commands: setup, setup-key, configure, usage-today/week/month, costs-today/week/month, summary. 3 layouts (expanded/horizontal/compact).
